profiles.title: Contract Block
profiles.blurb: Contract Block profiles use the [MES Contract Block] header in SBC Description blocks.
profiles.author: CptArthur

profiles.title: Faction Icon
profiles.blurb: Faction Icon profiles use the [MES Faction Icon] header in SBC Description blocks.
profiles.author: MeridiusIX

profiles.title: Mission
profiles.blurb: Mission profiles define contract/mission data used by MES contract blocks.
profiles.author: CptArthur

profiles.title: Prefab Gravity
profiles.blurb: Prefab Gravity profile tags parsed from MES source.
profiles.author: MeridiusIX

profiles.title: Safezone
profiles.blurb: Safezone profiles define safe zones spawned or linked via MES actions.
profiles.author: MeridiusIX

profiles.title: Shipyard
profiles.blurb: Shipyard profiles configure NPC shipyard blocks (blueprint building, repairs, scrap, grid takeover).
profiles.author: MeridiusIX

profiles.title: Store
profiles.blurb: Store profiles configure economy store block offers and orders.
profiles.author: MeridiusIX

profiles.title: Suit Upgrades
profiles.blurb: Suit Upgrades profiles use the [MES Suit Upgrades] header in SBC Description blocks.
profiles.author: MeridiusIX
